name: Price notation
description: Price notation is an indicator of the type of units in which Price is reported.
optionalityRules: Price notation is required to be reported if Price is reported.
Values are not reported for the not-reported Action types.
valueRules: Reported as ‘1’ where Price is reported as a monetary amount; or ‘3’ where Price is reported as a decimal.
If reported, the formats of the values conform to the 2024 Rules specifications.
